element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Basic ranged weapon with limited ammo
Fast melee enemies, require quick reaction
Increased fire rate, higher ammo consumption
Rapid-fire heavy weapon, significant ammo management
Hidden wall tiles activate to reveal treasures and supplies
Uniquely difficult enemy requiring pattern recognition

typical_relief_triggers: Eliminating all visible enemies in a room
Reaching safe corridors with no enemies
typical_tension_triggers: Entering new rooms with unknown enemy placement
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced action with room-to-room combat encounters interspersed with exploration periods; tension builds through enemy encounters and resource scarcity, releases through successful combat and supply discovery

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Wall tiles that appear slightly different or misaligned suggest hidden rooms; secret areas revealed by activating certain wall tiles
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Pushable/activatable wall segments that slide back to reveal hidden rooms containing treasure, health refills, or ammunition

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory combat against basic Nazi guards with knife and pistol; establishes core movement and shooting mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of dogs, submachine gun, and more complex room layouts with multiple enemy types; increased ammo management demands
difficulty_curve.late_game: Chain gun availability, higher enemy density, boss encounters at episode conclusions, more intricate level design requiring key collection
notable_spikes: Boss fight at end of each 10-level episode
Introduction of dogs as fast-moving threat requiring different tactical response
Late-game levels with resource scarcity before boss encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Players traverse corridors and rooms, discovering enemy placements and resources; each room presents combat challenge before proceeding to next area
Primary objective is locating and reaching the elevator to advance to next level; creates directional pressure through level design
Final level (10th) of each episode features singular boss enemy with unique behavior pattern; requires learned pattern recognition
Hidden areas throughout levels reward exploration and observation with supplies and treasure points without mandatory progression requirement
